steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage says the Shakopee center “presents Dakota history and culture to the tribe’s citizens” and that the Turtle Mountain center uses a similar strategy.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice D states that the center’s exhibits are designed mainly for tribal citizens, which directly echoes the clue about presenting history and culture to the tribe’s citizens.
The other three either introduce unrelated ideas (reconciling perspectives, multiple tribes, physical size) or contradict the focus on tribal audiences.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
